title: Functional Shulkers
description: Enhanced item accessibility and management using shulker boxes.
body: Refill the player's hand from items in the shulker box. Shoot bows and crossbows with ammo stored in a shulker box. Automatically fill items into shulker boxes upon pickup based on rules you create for different shulker box colors. This mod is compatible with Inventory Profiles Next and Easy Shulker Boxes.
